params.name: SINS
params.description:
On Sept 12, 1953 AD, the strapdown inertial navigation system (SINS) was officially introduced and used.
The strapdown inertial navigation system is a framework-free system that does not rely on external information or emit energy outward. It has the advantage of good stealth and can operate in a variety of complex environments. It can provide accurate navigation parameters to the carrier and has higher performance and reliability than similar platform-type inertial navigation systems. Curren …
